title: HG Duo Unblocker - Powerful Drain Cleaner, for Kitchen Sink or Bathroom Pipes - 2 x 500 ml
features: HG Drain Unblocker duo: Ultra effective drain unblocker for blocked pipes in and around the home. Extremely powerful and recommended for stubborn blockages or persistently clogged drains
Effective multi purpose cleaner for removing stubborn blockages: Kitchen or bathroom plug unblocker, breaks down drain blockages caused by oil, food, debris, soap scum or hair
Shower and bath unblocker: Heavy duty pipe unblocker and drain pipe cleaner uses unique 2-component technology (bottles A and B) which work together to treat the clogged drain
No splash, easy to use: Drain unblocker liquid is safe for all drain types and won't foam or splash. It's ready to use and won't need diluting. Safe to use in kitchen, utility areas and wet rooms
Includes: HG Duo Unblocker, 2 x 500ml. Discover the innovative range of HG professional household cleaning products, including HG mould remover spray, multi purpose cleaners and all surface cleaners
description: Product Description HG Duo Unblocker is a powerful drain blockage remover that can easily and effectively unblock your kitchen and bathroom drains. With this bathroom, utility or kitchen sink drain cleaner you may not need to call a plumber! Whether your blockage is due to oil, food, soap scum or hair, this two-step drain pipe cleaner and plug hole unblocker can effectively break down stubborn and persistent blockages, without damaging your pipes. Discover HG professional's wide range of specialist multi surface cleaner products and all purpose cleaner sprays for your home, office and outside space. Includes: HG Duo Unblocker liquid, 2 x 250ml (343100106) Instructions: 1. First remove as much of the stagnant water as possible. 2. Carefully pour on dosage of bottle A then B, as directed. NB – the dosage is different for kitchen and bathroom blockages, as stated on the packaging. 3. Leave the product to work for 1 hour. If possible, leave it to work overnight.  4. Rinse with a generous amount of water. Pour in the remainder of the liquid, as directed, for a post treatment. Use protective gloves and glasses. Keep out of reach/sight of children. Always read the label. Ingredients GMO Free Directions 1. Remove stagnant water. 2. Carefully pour on dosage of bottle A then B. 3. Leave the product to work for 1 hour or overnight. 4. Rinse with a generous amount of water. 5. Pour in the remainder of the liquid for a post treatment. Use protective gloves and glasses. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use together with other products. Safety Warning Use protective gloves and glasses. Keep out of reach of children. Do not use with other products. Box Contains 1 x 1kg Manufacturer Contact Information Unit 2 Lanswood Park Colchester Co7 7Fd See more
